name: Generic Receipt
description: Basic retail or service receipt with vendor, date, and total amount — region-agnostic
author: OCTO Prism Team

fields.name: ReceiptDate
fields.description: Date of purchase as printed on the receipt

fields.name: ReceiptNumber
fields.description: Receipt or transaction reference number if present

fields.name: TotalAmount
fields.description: Total amount paid — include currency symbol if present in the example

fields.name: PaymentMethod
fields.description: Cash, card, or other payment method

meta.promptHints: Generic receipt — currency, date format, and language may vary. Extract what is printed literally; prefer the amount nearest to the words 'total' or 'sum' for TotalAmount.
